title: verbascum eriocarpum
intro: Verbascum eriocarpum, also known as the Woolly Mullein or Eriocarpus Mullein, is a biennial plant species belonging to the figwort family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Verbascum eriocarpum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
